comment: F27 P9 T4-A — acceptance floors RECALIBRATED against the n=6 gold corpus after the T4-A matcher-side category-cluster calibration. T4-A is an OFFLINE win: no LLM cost, no prompt change, no model retrain. The matcher sensitivity audit (tests/qa-eval/matcher_audit.py) measured a +19 pp recall gap between strict raw-label category matching and category-cluster matching on the same n=6 captures, then validated 11/11 newly-recovered pairs as TRUE semantic equivalents (curator and Architect view the same scenario through different category lenses — curator describes WHAT BEHAVIOUR is being tested; Architect describes WHAT KIND OF CODE PATH the diff introduces). The matcher now clusters {HappyPath, EdgeCase, ErrorPath, Regression} into a single 'behavioral' bucket for cardinality and reports a separate category_label_accuracy diagnostic (0.622 on the n=6 corpus — Architect picks the curator's exact label 62%% of the time after a successful match). Performance category stays in its own cluster. Result: macro_recall 0.577 -> 0.767 (+33%% relative, +0.190 absolute), macro_precision_highest 0.502 -> 0.666 (+33%% relative), macro_F1_highest 0.527 -> 0.701 (+33%% relative). Per-PR: PR-955910 0.333 -> 0.583 (+25), PR-960543 0.364 -> 0.818 (+45), PR-966141 0.750 -> 0.750 (flat — already calibrated), PR-975848 0.750 -> 0.750 (flat), PR-976609 0.667 -> 1.000 (+33 PERFECT), PR-977882 0.600 -> 0.700 (+10). Spec target 0.80 macro_recall remains. Recall ceiling under drop-both relaxation is 0.85 — remaining 0.08-0.13 lives in verb-cluster aliasing and corpus expansion (T4-C). Floors lifted to ~78%% of T4-A measured (corpus 0.60/0.52/0.60 vs measured 0.767/0.666/0.767) AND strictly above T2 floors (0.45/0.39/0.45) so a silent revert to the pre-T4-A strict-category matcher trips the gate. Pin tests assert the cluster definition + the category_label_accuracy field are present in score_report.json. tests/qa-eval/category_aliases.json (NEW) is the source of truth; score_eval.py loads it at module init. Pass --strict-category on the CLI to reproduce pre-T4-A scores byte-for-byte for audit-trail purposes. enforcement: report_only until corpus crosses 0.80 macro recall (T4-C: n >= 15 corpus expansion + verb-cluster T4-B).

stability.comment: Vex 2026 — overall stability = 0.4*title_jaccard + 0.4*evidence_jaccard + 0.2*category_cosine across actual_run_*.json fixtures. Only enforced when --stability-runs > 1 AND at least one PR contributed >= 2 run fixtures. 0.75 is a starter floor; tune once we have ground-truth from N>=3 captures across the corpus.
